# Demote a voter to a learner.
# Applying AddLearnerNode to an existing voter (id 2) moves it out of the
# voter set and into the learner set.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=l2
----
voters=(1 3) learners=(2) auto-leave=false
